settings.text: Free US shipping on orders over $50

settings.headline: Dressed for every moment, tail and all.
settings.subtext: Tailvani is the pet fashion brand built for the millennial dog parent. Because your dog goes everywhere you go — they should look the part.

settings.text: Made for the Millennial Dog Parent

settings.title: Built for the dog that goes everywhere with you.
settings.body1: Tailvani was born from a simple truth: your dog is your plus-one. Coffee runs, brunch, the farmer's market, weekend road trips — they're always there. So why shouldn't they look as put-together as you do?
settings.body2: We design every piece with the millennial dog parent in mind — minimal, intentional, and built to move through real life.

settings.title: Free US Shipping
settings.desc: On all orders over $50. No code needed.

settings.title: Pet-Safe Materials
settings.desc: Soft, tested fabrics. Safe for sensitive skin.

settings.title: Made with Love
settings.desc: Every piece designed for real dog parents.

settings.review: The Classic Bowtie is the most complimented thing my dog has ever worn. Stopped three times on our morning walk. Worth every penny.
settings.name: Sarah M.
settings.pet: Dog mom to Biscuit, Golden Retriever

settings.review: Finally a pet brand that gets it. The aesthetic is everything I wanted — minimal, stylish, not cutesy. The Essential Tee fits perfectly.
settings.name: Jordan K.
settings.pet: Dog mom to Luna, French Bulldog

settings.review: Ordered the Ribbed Collar Vest and it arrived so fast. Quality is honestly better than I expected at this price point.
settings.name: Alex T.
settings.pet: Dog dad to Mochi, Shih Tzu

settings.title: Find the perfect fit
settings.desc: Measure your dog's neck circumference and back length to find their size. When between sizes, size up for comfort.

settings.title: Be first to new drops
settings.subtext: New arrivals, exclusive offers, and styling inspo — straight to your inbox. No fluff, promise.
